docs.title: Welcome to Mindustry Expansion!
docs.text:
A Mindustry mod, created by Artemwing Zuoran

This mod adds more varied and unique towers. It's still under development, so please be patient or help us to get this project to a release version

docs.text: Name Version EF - Expansion Foundation Unavailable TE - Turret Expansion 2.2.1 (Beta) FE - Machinery Expansion Unavaiable UE - Utility Expansion Unavaiable DE - Dynamic Expansion Unavailable

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: Login and go to github, find out issues or add ideas there! For discussion about making this mod, please join the Discord

docs.title: Latest Mod Version: 2.2.1 - Beta
docs.text:
Mod still in development

Use latest or release version for better experience.

docs.title: About Turret Expansion
docs.text:
Turret Expansion is a mod part of the Expansion series, Created by Artemwing Zuoran and Contributor. The Turrets Expansion adds more Turrets for a better experience, more style variants, and different damage types.

Not based on reality, we made some turrets from imagination and ideas, not limited by reality.
